item.title: Chapter I: System Performance
item.description: System Performance Understand Performance Problems Measurement Principle Latency CPU Memory Network Disk Concurrency Locking Pessimistic Optimistic Cohence Caching Static Data Dynamic Data What is performance? performance is responsive time of a system Performance proble is the result of some queue building somewhere Reasons: Ineffecient slow processing Serial resource access Limit resource capacity
